start.custom:
local item = string.match(aura_env.state.name, "%[(%u.+)%]") 
if item == nil then
    item = string.match(aura_env.state.name, "%[(%d.+)%]")
end
local letter = ""
local switch
local count1 = 0
local count2 = 2
local count3 = 0
local count4 = 0
local count5 = 0
local short = {"i","I","j","l","'"," "}
local medium = {"-","r","f","t"}
local long = {"a","A","b","B","c","C","d","D","e","E","F","g","G","h","H","J","k","K","L","n","N","o","O","p","P","q","Q","R","s","S","T","u","U","v","V","x","X","y","Y","z","Z"}
local vlong = {"m","M","w","W"}


for i=1, #item do
    letter = string.sub(item, i, i)
    switch = false
    for _, j in pairs(short) do
        if letter == j then
            count1 = count1 + 1
            switch = true
            break
        end
    end
    if not switch then
        for _, j in pairs(medium) do
            if letter == j then
                count2 = count2 + 1
                switch = true
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if not switch then
        for _, j in pairs(long) do
            if letter == j then
                count3 = count3 + 1
                switch = true
                break
            end 
        end
    end
    if not switch then
        for _, j in pairs(vlong) do
            if letter == j then
                count4 = count4 + 1
                switch = true
                break
            end 
        end
    end
    if not switch then
        count5 = count5 + 1
    end
end

local width = count1*aura_env.config.w1 + count2*aura_env.config.w2 + count3*aura_env.config.w3 + count4*aura_env.config.w4 + count5*aura_env.config.w3 + aura_env.config.w0

aura_env.region:SetRegionWidth(width)

trigger.custom:
function(allstates, event, text, _, _, _, test, ...)
    if event == "CHAT_MSG_LOOT" then
        -- Texto de Loot
        --print(text)
        local itemname, playername, itemid, amount, itemicon, quality, a,b, _, mode, showmeloot
        
        --if aura_env.config["filterloot"] then
        --    playername = UnitName("player")
        --else
        --    if test == "" then
        --print("test was ^^")
        --        playername = string.match(text, "(%u[^%c%p%s%d]-)[%s%-]")
        --    else
        --print("test was: "..test)
        --        playername = string.match(test, "([^%c%p%s%d]+)%-?")
        --    end
        
        --
        --    if playername == "You" then
        playername = UnitName("player")
        --    end
        --end
        
        if test == "" then
            --print("test was ^^")
            playername = string.match(text, "(%u[^%c%p%s%d]-)[%s%-]")
        else
            --print("test was: "..test)
            playername = string.match(test, "([^%c%p%s%d]+)%-?")
        end
        
        --
        if playername == "You" then
            playername = UnitName("player")
        end
        
        if playername == UnitName("player") then
            --print("Filtro ACTIVO PlayerName: " .. playername)
            showmeloot = true
        else
            --print("Filtro INACTIVO PlayerName: " .. playername)
            showmeloot = false
        end
        
        --print("playername: " .. playername)
        if showmeloot then
            --from the text, extract the item id and with it get the item link and the icon
            if event == "CHAT_MSG_LOOT" then
                --itemid = string.match(text, "m%:(%d+)")
                itemid = string.match(text, "(|c.+|r) ?x?(%d*).?")
                --print("itemid: " .. itemid)
                _, itemname, quality, _, _, _, _, _, _, itemicon  = GetItemInfo(itemid)
                --print("itemname: " .. itemname)
                amount = string.match(text, "h%|rx(%d-)%.")
            end
            
            if amount == nil then
                amount = 1
            end
            --print("amount: " .. amount)
            
            if string.match(text, "receive") == nil then
                if string.match(text, "create") == nil then
                    if string.match(text, "won") == nil then
                        mode = "unknown"
                    else
                        mode = 3 --win
                    end
                else
                    mode = 1 --create
                end
            else
                mode = 2 --receive
            end
            --print(test)
            --print("mode: " .. mode)
            
            if aura_env.config["filterquality"][quality+1] then
                if aura_env.config["filterevent"][mode] then
                    --setup the trigger information for each clone
                    
                    if allstates[itemid..playername] ~= nil then
                        local data
                        data = allstates[itemid..playername]
                        amount = tonumber(amount) + tonumber(data.stacks)
                    end
                    
                    allstates[itemid..playername] = {
                        show = true,
                        changed = true,
                        progressType ="timed",
                        duration = aura_env.config["displayduration"],
                        expirationTime = GetTime() + aura_env.config["displayduration"],
                        autoHide = true,
                        receiver = WA_ClassColorName(playername), --custom var that will is accessed with  %1.receiver
                        name = itemname, --%1.n
                        link = itemname,
                        icon = itemicon,
                        stacks = tonumber(amount)
                    }
                end
            end
        end
        
        
    elseif event == "OPTIONS" then
        local examples = {
            [3356] = "John",
            [2447] = "Freddy",
            [3820] = "Bruno"
        }
        for itemid, receiver in pairs(examples) do
            local _, itemname, _, _, _, _, _, _, _, icon = GetItemInfo(itemid)
            allstates[itemid] = {
                show = true,
                changed = true,
                progressType = "static",
                value = 1,
                total = 1,
                duration = aura_env.config["displayduration"],
                expirationTime = GetTime() + aura_env.config["displayduration"],
                autoHide = true,
                receiver = receiver,
                name = itemname,
                icon = icon,
                stacks = 1
            }
        end
    end
    
    return true
end
